summary: Schedule/Shift Management System - Complete E2E testing. Backend: 23/23 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working - Horarios tab visible in ProjectDetail, calendar view, shift creation dialog, week navigation, export, and user assignment sections.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/schedules?project_id={id} - List shifts for project (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/schedules - List all shifts (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/schedules with date_from/date_to filters (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/schedules - Create new shift (200 OK, returns shift_id)
Backend: POST /api/schedules with requires_approval=true (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/schedules - Invalid project returns 404
Backend: PUT /api/schedules/{shift_id} - Update shift (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/schedules/{shift_id} - Non-existent returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/schedules/{shift_id} - Delete shift (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/schedules/{shift_id} - Non-existent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/claim - Auto-confirm when requires_approval=false
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/claim - Pending status when requires_approval=true
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/claim - Duplicate claim returns 400
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/claim - Non-existent shift returns 404
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/unclaim - Cancel registration (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/unclaim - Not registered returns 400
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/approve - Approve assignment (status=confirmed)
Backend: POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/approve - Reject assignment (status=rejected)
Backend: GET /api/schedules/export/excel - Returns Excel file (application/vnd.openxmlformats)
Backend: GET /api/schedules/export/pdf - Returns PDF file (application/pdf)
Backend: GET /api/schedules/my-shifts - Get current user's shifts (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/schedules/my-shifts with date filters (200 OK)
Backend: Existing shift shift_d23ee8c88971 accessible in project
Frontend: 'Horarios' tab visible in ProjectDetail tabs bar
Frontend: 'Programación de Turnos' header displays with description
Frontend: 'Crear Turno' button visible for admin/PM users
Frontend: 'Exportar' dropdown button with Excel/PDF options
Frontend: Week navigation - 'Anterior', 'Siguiente', 'Ir a esta semana' links
Frontend: Week date range header displays correctly
Frontend: 7-day calendar grid (LUN-DOM) with day numbers
Frontend: 'Sin turnos' placeholder when no shifts in day
Frontend: '+ Agregar' quick-add button for each day
Frontend: 'Mis Turnos Esta Semana' section displays
Frontend: Create shift dialog opens with all form fields
Frontend: Date input field (data-testid='shift-date-input')
Frontend: Preset schedule selector (data-testid='shift-preset-select') with options like '8:00 AM - 5:00 PM'
Frontend: Max slots input (data-testid='shift-slots-input')
Frontend: Description textarea (data-testid='shift-description-input')
Frontend: Requires approval checkbox (data-testid='shift-approval-checkbox')
Frontend: Dialog cancel and submit buttons working
seed_data_creation: Multiple test shifts created and cleaned up during pytest execution with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule/Shift management fully implemented and tested. Endpoints: GET/POST /api/schedules, PUT/DELETE /api/schedules/{shift_id}, POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/claim, POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/unclaim, POST /api/schedules/{shift_id}/approve, GET /api/schedules/export/excel, GET /api/schedules/export/pdf, GET /api/schedules/my-shifts. Frontend: ProjectSchedule.js component with calendar view, shift CRUD, claim/unclaim, approval workflow, and export functionality.

backend_api.schedules_crud: WORKING - Create, Read, Update, Delete shifts
backend_api.approval_workflow: WORKING - Admin can approve/reject pending claims
backend_api.export_pdf: WORKING - Exports to .pdf with company branding
backend_api.my_shifts: WORKING - Returns shifts assigned to current user

frontend_ui.create_shift_dialog: WORKING - Full form with preset schedules
